chokepoints.name: Apple Business Connect enrollment
unblocks: NEW-A-5 iOS Safari mDL flow staging walk
chokepoints.rationale: Apple-side weeks-long enrollment; cannot be parallelized from inside the codebase. Without it, the iOS Safari same-device lane stays gated.

chokepoints.name: ses-proxy Lambda deployment + secret sync
chokepoints.rationale: Lambda is dormant until first email blast goes live. Per memory/env-secret-management: BLAST_RECEIPTS_SECRET must sync across CF Pages ↔ Lambda.

chokepoints.name: Mainnet deploy composite (SnapshotAnchor + DistrictRegistry + DebateMarket)
chokepoints.rationale: Single composite — all three contracts share the multisig + audit cycle. Splitting them would burn duplicate audit cost. Treat as one chokepoint.

chokepoints.name: TEE Nitro Enclave provisioning
unblocks: NEW-T4-2 ZK proof on AI actions
chokepoints.rationale: Nitro Enclave account + signed image distribution + on-chain attestation registry are all single-purpose for the TEE lane. Client wiring already shipped in I-phase; this is the runtime.

chokepoints.name: Sentry on-call wiring + observability stack
chokepoints.rationale: Sentry → PagerDuty wiring + BOUNDARY_CELL_RATE_HIGH human routing per memory/iphase_completion.md §7. Substrate complete; ops needs to point alerts at a human.
